summary: All six requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 (DaysLeftBanner), REQ-2 (upcoming reminders/targets on Dashboard), REQ-3 (CalendarClock icon in header), REQ-4 (TimerPage with full CRUD and live countdown), REQ-5 (BottomNavBar), and REQ-6 (TargetMotivationWidget) are all present. One minor gap exists around bottom padding for all pages. One hallucinated feature is the addition of seconds to the countdown display, which was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: The bar does not overlap main page content (page content has bottom padding)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows BottomNavBar is added and fixed at the bottom, but there is no explicit evidence in the truncated diff of bottom padding being added to page content wrappers across all pages to prevent overlap. Only some pages show pb-24 in the truncated content.

hallucinated_features.description: Timer countdown includes a seconds field in the live display
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 specifies the live countdown should show months, days, hours, and minutes only. The TimerPage implementation computes and likely displays seconds as well, as the computeCountdown function returns a seconds field.
